'''ât-zh-l''' ('''katazhal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quake|quake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quake|quake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-zh-l
|-
! Lemma
| katazhal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhal|thitazhal]] || [[word:jitazhal|jitazhal]] || [[word:shitazhal|shitazhal]] || [[word:kitazhal|kitazhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhal|thuthutazhal]] || [[word:jujutazhal|jujutazhal]] || [[word:shushutazhal|shushutazhal]] || [[word:kukutazhal|kukutazhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhal|thutazhal]] || [[word:jutazhal|jutazhal]] || [[word:shutazhal|shutazhal]] || [[word:kutazhal|kutazhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutazhal|thutazhal]] || [[word:jutazhal|jutazhal]] || [[word:shutazhal|shutazhal]] || [[word:kutazhal|kutazhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhal|thetazhal]] || [[word:jetazhal|jetazhal]] || [[word:shetazhal|shetazhal]] || [[word:ketazhal|ketazhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotazhal|thothotazhal]] || [[word:jojotazhal|jojotazhal]] || [[word:shoshotazhal|shoshotazhal]] || [[word:kokotazhal|kokotazhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhal|thotazhal]] || [[word:jotazhal|jotazhal]] || [[word:shotazhal|shotazhal]] || [[word:kotazhal|kotazhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhal|thotazhal]] || [[word:jotazhal|jotazhal]] || [[word:shotazhal|shotazhal]] || [[word:kotazhal|kotazhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtazhal|thĂŠtazhal]] || [[word:jĂŠtazhal|jĂŠtazhal]] || [[word:shĂŠtazhal|shĂŠtazhal]] || [[word:kĂŠtazhal|kĂŠtazhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhal|thathatazhal]] || [[word:jajatazhal|jajatazhal]] || [[word:shashatazhal|shashatazhal]] || [[word:kakatazhal|kakatazhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhal|thatazhal]] || [[word:jatazhal|jatazhal]] || [[word:shatazhal|shatazhal]] || [[word:katazhal|katazhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhal|thatazhal]] || [[word:jatazhal|jatazhal]] || [[word:shatazhal|shatazhal]] || [[word:katazhal|katazhal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatazhal|shatazhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatazhal|goshatazhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatazhal|gokishatazhal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatazhalnĂŒ|shatazhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhalnknĂŒ|goshatazhalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhalnĂŒ|gokishatazhalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatazhalshĂ«|shatazhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkshĂ«|goshatazhalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatazhalshĂ«|gokishatazhalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhalro|shatazhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkro|goshatazhalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhalro|gokishatazhalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhalmu|shatazhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkmu|goshatazhalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhalmu|gokishatazhalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatazhalsher|shatazhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatazhalnksher|goshatazhalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatazhalsher|gokishatazhalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatazhalng|shatazhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkng|goshatazhalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatazhalng|gokishatazhalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatazhalya|shatazhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkya|goshatazhalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatazhalya|gokishatazhalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatazhalyam|shatazhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkyam|goshatazhalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatazhalyam|gokishatazhalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhalnĂŒshĂ«|shatazhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatazhalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatazhalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhalnĂŒro|shatazhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhalnknĂŒro|goshatazhalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhalnĂŒro|gokishatazhalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhalnĂŒmu|shatazhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhalnknĂŒmu|goshatazhalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhalnĂŒmu|gokishatazhalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhalshĂ«nĂŒ|shatazhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatazhalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatazhalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhalshĂ«ro|shatazhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkshĂ«ro|goshatazhalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhalshĂ«ro|gokishatazhalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhalshĂ«mu|shatazhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkshĂ«mu|goshatazhalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhalshĂ«mu|gokishatazhalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhalronĂŒ|shatazhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkronĂŒ|goshatazhalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhalronĂŒ|gokishatazhalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhalroshĂ«|shatazhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkroshĂ«|goshatazhalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhalroshĂ«|gokishatazhalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhalromu|shatazhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkromu|goshatazhalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhalromu|gokishatazhalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhalmunĂŒ|shatazhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkmunĂŒ|goshatazhalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhalmunĂŒ|gokishatazhalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhalmushĂ«|shatazhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkmushĂ«|goshatazhalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhalmushĂ«|gokishatazhalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhalmuro|shatazhalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhalnkmuro|goshatazhalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhalmuro|gokishatazhalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
